texto: It's much more difficult to maintain personal hygiene if you're obese. Believe it or not, I've found items like remote controls and packages of cigarettes in people's fat rolls.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jan Garavaglia: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “It's much more difficult to maintain personal hygiene if you're obese. Believe it or not, I've fo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, health, difficult pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor.
